description_long: This object is a compact urban train station featuring a single platform with a covered waiting area and a modern passenger train adjacent to the platform. The platform is bordered by a low fence and decorated with small patches of flowering shrubs at both ends, adding a touch of greenery. The canopy over the platform is arched and constructed from what appears to be corrugated metal or plastic, supported by a central post. The train itself is streamlined, with large windows and a light greenish exterior, and sits on a short section of visible railway track. There is a small ramp or stairway leading from the platform to the ground, and a lamp post or signal structure is present near the platform edge. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for a suburban or small urban neighborhood.
description: A small, modern train station with a single covered platform, adjacent passenger train, and landscaped greenery at the ends.
description_view_0: Side view showing the train parallel to the platform, the arched canopy, lamp post, and flowering shrubs at the platform ends.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the train's face, the length of the platform, canopy, and the arrangement of the tracks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the train's windows, the platform's edge, and the ramp or stairway leading down.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the train and the end of the platform with the canopy and shrubs visible.
attribute_platform_canopies: One arched canopy located centrally on the platform, medium-sized, made of corrugated material, supported by a single post.
attribute_railway_tracks: One visible railway track made of steel rails and wooden or concrete ties, running parallel to the platform and extending in front of the train.
